description.default: Optional. Enables /debug test email button. Set after import: Solutions -> QFU -> Cloud flows -> QFU-Debug-SendTestEmails -> copy GUID from browser URL. Leave disabled to skip.

label.description: Optional. Enables /debug test email button. Set after import: Solutions -> QFU -> Cloud flows -> QFU-Debug-SendTestEmails -> copy GUID from browser URL. Leave disabled to skip.

displayname.default: OPTIONAL: Debug Test Email Flow ID

label.description: OPTIONAL: Debug Test Email Flow ID
